items.headline: Joel Embiid wants 76ers fans at Philadelphia games. The Knicks know that New Yorkers are coming
items.description:
GREENBURGH, N.Y. (AP) — Joel Embiid wants Philadelphia fans at the Philadelphia games.
Good luck with that. One way or another, the Knicks know the New Yorkers are coming.

items.headline: Kimi Antonelli wins the Miami Grand Prix for his third straight F1 victory
items.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Kimi Antonelli wins the Miami Grand Prix for his third straight F1 victory.

items.headline: Kimi Antonelli wins the Miami Grand Prix for his third straight F1 victory
items.description:
MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Kimi Antonelli won the Miami Grand Prix on Sunday for his third consecutive Formula 1 victory as the 19-year-old Mercedes drivers continued to show he's a legitimate championship contender.
Antonelli started from the pole but had a slick start on a damp surface at the Miami International Autodrome. Threats of heavy rain led F1 to move up the start of the race by three hours, and there was an early morning heavy thunderstorm with lightning strikes directly over the Hard Rock Stadium, but it had cleared by the time the event began.

items.headline: Wild will be without Joel Eriksson Ek and Jonas Brodin for first two games of series vs. Avs
items.description:
DENVER (AP) — The Minnesota Wild will be without forward Joel Eriksson Ek and defenseman Jonas Brodin for the first two games of their second-round series against the Colorado Avalanche because of lower-body injuries.
Neither player made the trip to Denver. Wild coach John Hynes said the team is still “making a couple decisions on the lineup" ahead of Game 1 on Sunday night.

items.headline: Braves place Ronald Acuña Jr. on the 10-day injured list with a strained hamstring
items.description:
DENVER (AP) — The Atlanta Braves placed star right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr. on the 10-day injured list because of a strained left hamstring on Sunday.
The Braves owned the best record in baseball at 24-10 entering Sunday's game against the Colorado Rockies. But they'll have to get by for now without one of their top players.
